evidence.snippet: Our unique combination of deep engine design expertise, world class development facilities, and top-notch manufacturing capabilities, make Cobra AERO a strategic partner for your comprehensive power and propulsion needs.

[Currawong Engineering](https://www.currawongeng.com/) is a world leader in the field of engine powertrain systems for unmanned aerial vehicles in both military and commercial applications, and offers specialist machining services and engineering design consulting services to local and international customers.
**AXX****N** – Standard IC engine platform. Shaft power is motive (connected directly to the propeller or pump). Generator provides enough electrical power to run comms, avionics, sensors, etc.

items.notes: Small IC engines (A33 and A99 families) with shaft power delivered to propeller or pump for UAV propulsion

evidence.snippet: **AXX****S** – Full series hybrid whereby all available engine shaft power is converted to electrical energy. Use cases include electrically driven craft and gen-sets.

**AXX****P** – Parallel hybrid. Motor/generator can assist the IC engine in providing additional shaft power for time-limited requirements (sprint, take-off, etc.). Additionally, this topology provides more generator output than the ‘N’ configuration.

items.notes: Series hybrid variants (AXXS) convert all IC engine shaft power to electrical energy; parallel hybrid (AXXP) adds generator output for electrical loads

evidence.snippet: [Currawong Engineering](https://www.currawongeng.com/) is a world leader in the field of engine powertrain systems for unmanned aerial vehicles in both military and commercial applications, and offers specialist machining services and engineering design consulting services to local and international customers.

drone_supply_chain_role.notes: Sells small IC engine propulsion systems (A33, A99 families) for UAVs; does not manufacture complete drones
